# NotificationsForwarding

**Class**

A class for handling notification forwarding in your accessory’s data provider extension.

## Declaration

```swift
final class NotificationsForwarding
```

## Overview

Implement the [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/NotificationsForwarding/AccessoryNotificationsHandler] protocol in your [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AccessoryTransportExtension/AccessoryDataProvider] extension to receive and manage system notifications that iOS forwards to your accessory.

## Managing notification sessions

- **NotificationsForwarding.Session**: A session object that enables communication between your extension and the system.

## Handling notification events

- **NotificationsForwarding.AccessoryNotificationsHandler**: A protocol that defines methods for handling notification lifecycle events in your extension.

## Creating handlers

- **NotificationsForwarding.HandlerFactory**: A type alias for a factory that creates notification handlers.

## Notification receipt

- **NotificationsForwarding.AccessoryNotificationsHandler**: A protocol that defines methods for handling notification lifecycle events in your extension.
- **NotificationsForwarding.Session**: A session object that enables communication between your extension and the system.
- **NotificationsForwarding.HandlerFactory**: A type alias for a factory that creates notification handlers.

## Conforms To

- AccessoryFeature
- AppExtensionPoint.Capability
- Identifiable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
